description_long: This is a large, freestanding outdoor bulletin board with a pitched, shingled roof made of wood, designed to protect posted notices from the elements. The front display area is constructed from dark wooden planks and is covered with various paper notices, announcements, and a central illustrated poster. The frame is robust, featuring thick vertical and horizontal beams, and the lower section includes a decorative wooden barrier with diamond-shaped cutouts. The back is plain, showing only the wooden structure, while the sides reveal the depth of the roof and the sturdy support posts. The overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance, suitable for public or communal use in an outdoor setting.
description: A large, wooden outdoor bulletin board with a shingled roof and multiple posted notices, supported by thick beams and a decorative lower barrier.
description_view_0: Front view showing the notice area filled with papers and a central poster, framed by thick wooden beams and topped with a shingled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and pitch of the shingled roof and the thickness of the supporting posts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back and the structural beams, with no posted notices visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the roof's overhang and the solid vertical supports.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular frame made of thick, dark wood beams with a pitched shingled roof and a decorative lower barrier featuring diamond cutouts.
